What's it costing them in three months? What's it costing them in a year in five years and 30 years? ## [06:06 - 09:07]

So you might not have the classical headline like you would see in a sales letter But what is that first big promise that you're going to make in your sales video? It's it's genuinely hard to sell Authority is what makes people believe you Then you want to think about proof and testimonials And then you know, we're getting and this is going to take up the bulk of or at least the first 50% Of your sales video or your sales letter or your sales script Then you want to foreshadow urgency So this is you're going to foreshadow the idea of this is going to be a limited offer Because your open cart period is only going to be for a certain period of time And after your open cart period ends, then the deal they get is Not going to be as good or they might not even be able to get the deal So you want to just foreshadow that Then you want to make your offer and this is where you cover the benefits and the features You know who what the product does who it's for How it's going to transform your prospects life for the better What makes it different from other products in the market?
